Nearby theorems
Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  3eqtrd Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem 3eqtrd 2801
Description: A deduction from three chained equalities. (Contributed by NM, 29-Oct-1995.)
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
3eqtrd.1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐵)
3eqtrd.2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐵 = 𝐶)
3eqtrd.3 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐶 = 𝐷)
Assertion
Ref Expression
3eqtrd ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐷)
Proof of Theorem 3eqtrd
StepHypRef Expression
1 3eqtrd.1 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐵)
2 3eqtrd.2 . . 3 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐵 = 𝐶)
3 3eqtrd.3 . . 3 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐶 = 𝐷)
42, 3eqtrd 2797 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐵 = 𝐷)
51, 4eqtrd 2797 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐷)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   = wceq 1560
This theorem was proved from axioms:  ax-mp 5  ax-1 6  ax-2 7  ax-3 8  ax-gen 1815  ax-4 1829  ax-5 1930  ax-6 1987  ax-7 2028  ax-9 2152  ax-ext 2734
This theorem depends on definitions:  df-bi 209  df-an 400  df-ex 1800  df-cleq 2754
